relationships: ber:Ad zemreɣ ad iliɣ din ɣef tizi n tis snat d uzgen
ber:Zemreɣ ad iliɣ din ɣef tizi n tis snat d uzgen
ber:Tella terra-iyi tmara ad awḍeɣ s axxam ɣef tis snat d uzgen
ber:A win yufan, Tom ad d-yeqqel ɣer uxxam ɣef tizi n tis snat d uzgen
ber:A win yufan, Tom ad yili da ɣef tizi n tis snat d uzgen
ber:Bɣiɣ amahil-a ad ifak seg-a ɣef tis snat d uzgen
ber:Bɣiɣ ad ifak umahil-a seg-a ɣef tis snat d uzgen
ber:Attan qrib d tis snat d uzgen
ber:Zemreɣ ad d-qqleɣ ɣef tizi n tis snat d uzgen
